classData.comment:
/**
 * @module ai/services/memory-core/helpers/throttleShedHeal
 * @summary Orchestrator-agnostic factory for the `throttle-shed` heal-operation: the recovery counterpart to a
 * resource-contention / exhaustion fault. Where `freeze`/`quarantine` fence a corrupt collection, `throttle-shed`
 * relieves CONTENTION ŌĆö it opens a bounded shed-window on `MaintenanceBackpressureService` so the orchestrator
 * defers ALL heavy-maintenance for a while, letting the contended resource recover, then auto-expires (no operator).
 *
 * The actuation is injected as `setShedWindow` so the heal-op is unit-testable without the live service (mirrors
 * `createFreezeHealOperation` / `createReEmbedMissingHealOperation`). Lossless ŌĆö no data mutated; it only paces work.
 */
classData.name: ai/services/memory-core/helpers/throttleShedHeal
classData.summary:
Orchestrator-agnostic factory for the `throttle-shed` heal-operation: the recovery counterpart to a
resource-contention / exhaustion fault. Where `freeze`/`quarantine` fence a corrupt collection, `throttle-shed`
relieves CONTENTION ŌĆö it opens a bounded shed-window on `MaintenanceBackpressureService` so the orchestrator
defers ALL heavy-maintenance for a while, letting the contended resource recover, then auto-expires (no operator).

The actuation is injected as `setShedWindow` so the heal-op is unit-testable without the live service (mirrors
`createFreezeHealOperation` / `createReEmbedMissingHealOperation`). Lossless ŌĆö no data mutated; it only paces work.

classData.description: Default shed-window: how long heavy-maintenance is deferred per throttle-shed heal when the evidence carries no explicit shedDurationMs. Long enough to relieve a transient contention spike, short enough not to starve the maintenance lanes ŌĆö and bounded + auto-expiring regardless, so a mis-fire self-heals.
classData.name: DEFAULT_SHED_DURATION_MS

classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary The `throttle-shed` heal-operation: open a bounded shed-window (via the injected `setShedWindow`) so the
 * orchestrator defers heavy-maintenance and the contended resource recovers. Returns the actuation detail; the
 * window auto-expires with no operator. The duration comes from the diagnosis evidence (`shedDurationMs`) when
 * present, else the factory default.
 * @param {Object} options
 * @param {Function} options.setShedWindow `(durationMs, now) => shedUntil` ŌĆö opens the shed-window (the locked seam).
 * @param {Number} [options.shedDurationMs=DEFAULT_SHED_DURATION_MS] Default window when evidence carries none.
 * @returns {Function} The `async ({collection, evidence, now}) => {status, detail}` heal-operation.
 */
classData.summary:
The `throttle-shed` heal-operation: open a bounded shed-window (via the injected `setShedWindow`) so the
orchestrator defers heavy-maintenance and the contended resource recovers. Returns the actuation detail; the
window auto-expires with no operator. The duration comes from the diagnosis evidence (`shedDurationMs`) when
present, else the factory default.

params.description: (durationMs, now) => shedUntil ŌĆö opens the shed-window (the locked seam).
params.name: options.setShedWindow

classData.name: createThrottleShedHealOperation
